value.title: Sunflowers
value.description: Sunflowers is a still-life painting by Vincent van Gogh. It depicts sunflowers arranged in a vase and belongs to The Metropolitan Museum of Art collection.

value.title: Young Woman with a Water Pitcher
value.description: Young Woman with a Water Pitcher is a painting by Johannes Vermeer. It shows a young woman holding a water pitcher and reflects Vermeer's interest in light, balance, and domestic interior scenes.

value.title: Cypresses
value.description: Cypresses is a painting by Vincent van Gogh. It shows tall cypress trees and demonstrates the expressive brushwork and intense color associated with his late landscapes.
